principle: Stop never consumes an extra model continuation for answer correction. Stop only records next-turn handoff. SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit inject pending work items.

calibration.hook_boundary: thin reminder and state capture only; not completion authority

PreToolUse: deny active runtime/toolchain/MCP mutation without explicit approval
deny first mutation for non-trivial tasks until read-only context sync exists
Stop: write Local Optimization Error, Impact Analysis, and Context Synchronization TODOs only when useful
SessionStart_UserPromptSubmit: inject NEXT_TURN_WORK_ITEMS once when previous Stop recorded them
mark pending handoff delivered after injection
add compact task purpose and skill/tool/mcp/agent frame

workframe_marker: Write-Output "HOOK_WORKFRAME purpose=<why>; surface=<target>; impact=<affected surfaces>; checks=<direct checks>; rollback=<plan>"

mcp.rule: MCP output is candidate evidence only. Configured does not mean exposed.
